top_signals.title: Asian Equities Drop Led by Kospi, Oil Extends Gain: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks declined as fresh selling in semiconductor stocks renewed concerns over the sustainability of the artificial intelligence trade. Crude oil climbed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alibaba’s U.S.-listed shares rise 4% after Qwen AI set to be integrated in Apple Intelligence
top_signals.summary: The Cyberspace Administration of China on Wednesday included Apple's AI services on a list of approved providers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
